name: Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the first 6 ingredients. Bring to a boil and simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
2. Freeze the soup with the cheese in a freezer bag taped to the soup container.
3. When thawed, sauté onion in butter until lightly browned.
4. Add flour and milk to make a white sauce.
5. Gradually add grated cheddar cheese to the white sauce, stirring until melted.
6. Stir the melted cheese mixture into the soup and heat through.
